paragraphs.text: THE ANCHORITE WHO MADE FRESH WATER ‘Do not do that; but rather, let us pray to our Lord Jesus Christ, AT SEA BY HIS PRAYER our true God, who does great and wonderful things which cannot be counted <Jb 34:26>.
